subject: a tall wooden palisade wall with shields on its parapet, a small Eldrazi scion at its base, a massive Eldrazi silhouette looming in foggy background
description: The foreground shows the base of a tall wooden palisade fortification wall. Circular shields hang on the upper section of the wall near a watchtower or parapet. A small pale creature with long limbs and tentacle-like appendages crouches at the very base of the wall — clearly diminutive compared to the structure. In the far background, a colossal vaguely humanoid form is visible in the mist, dwarfing everything. Bare dead trees and bleak grey landscape surround the fortification.
foreground: large wooden palisade wall with shields, small Eldrazi scion at base
background: massive Eldrazi silhouette in fog, dead trees, grey sky
emotion: dread, scale contrast — small defenders vs cosmic threat
